title: eriobotrya averyanovii
intro: Eriobotrya averyanovii, also known as Averyanov's plumu, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is native to Vietnam and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriobotrya averyanovii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tea, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
